name: RecGPT (Torchx)
postCreateCommand: mix local.hex --force && mix local.rebar --force && mix deps.get && (apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq curl) && (GRPCURL_VER=1.8.9; ARCH=$(uname -m); case $ARCH in x86_64) A=linux_x86_64;; aarch64) A=linux_arm64;; *) A=linux_x86_64;; esac; curl -sSLo /tmp/grpcurl.tar.gz https://github.com/fullstorydev/grpcurl/releases/download/v${GRPCURL_VER}/grpcurl_${GRPCURL_VER}_${A}.tar.gz && tar -xzf /tmp/grpcurl.tar.gz -C /tmp && mv /tmp/grpcurl /usr/local/bin/ && rm /tmp/grpcurl.tar.gz) && ./scripts/setup_exla_libs.sh
